body:
DIRECTIVE: THE COMPLETION MANDATE — close EVERY gap between intent and reality, not one. Base SLS(30)/9.44, target the version that finally makes the two programs one. This supersedes the piecemeal framing: Manuel's instruction is that a partially-bridged system is still a broken system. Read TUNGSTEN_GAP_REGISTER.md (already in files/from-chat) as the map. Obey tungsten-forge v2.0. Every change = a filed Change Warrant with a numeric prediction FIRST.

== THE PRINCIPLE ==
Intent meets reality only when ALL six gaps are closed together, in dependency order. Closing G1 while G3 stays open just moves the overfit to a different cell. Closing G2 before G1 builds a relationship-learner that overfits relationships. The bridges are a system, not a menu. Do not report success until every gap below is either CLOSED (verified) or explicitly HELD with a stated reason and a warrant for the next pass. No gap may be silently skipped.

== DEPENDENCY ORDER (mandatory sequence) ==
LAYER 1 — the load-bearing bridges (do first, together):
 G1 WALK-FORWARD REPLICATION. Replace the single 70/30 split (TRAIN_START line ~34261; the sCnt*0.7 pattern in every optimizer) with 3-5 disjoint chronological windows. A parameter set is ACCEPTED only if it beats equal-weight baseline on the orthogonal metric in a MAJORITY of windows AND out-of-window mean is positive. Selection penalty rises with log(combos): a 562,500-combo search must clear ~0.188R expected best-of-K noise. Predict: holdout collapse -19..-44pp -> single digits.
 G3 POWER FLOOR EVERYWHERE. W#9's n<500 floor is in SLS30 but PENDING_BACKTEST — confirm it on a real run. Then extend: session weights still admit at sHoldout<10 (line ~5991), volatility weights similarly. Every learning cell reports its MDE and returns the prior when under-powered. No exceptions.

LAYER 2 — the intelligence the design always intended (only safe once Layer 1 holds):
 G2 RELATIONSHIP LEARNING. The system currently measures single-voice IC only (pairwise ~absent, lagged/transition edge ZERO — confirmed). Add, each powered n>=500, each null-controlled, each required to replicate across the G1 windows before storage: (a) pairwise interaction IC reported vs sum-of-marginals; (b) lagged cross-regime edge (regime t -> profitability t+k, using the existing transition matrix as raw material); (c) cross-session/cross-HTF conditioning collapsed until n>=500. Store survivors in a relationships provenance table in forge_ledger.json. This is the "correlations and relationships regardless of complexity" mandate — it is only intelligence if it replicates.
 G6 SUB-PHASE SUBORDINATION. Phase 3B.5/3B.6/3C.5 inherit G1+G3. A session×regime cell that can't clear n>=500 across a majority of windows returns the parent regime weight, logged UNDERPOWERED — never a fabricated refinement.

LAYER 3 — the gates that make the verdict mean something (must pass before any ghost result is believed):
 G4 PARITY. Calibration/ghost/live must invoke the SAME function for scoring, TP/SL, sizing, gates. Single ComputeEntryDecision(context) entry point; context affects only data source. Prove it: 500-bar live-sync replay matches bar-for-bar. Mismatch = P0, halt.
 G5 NULL-GHOST. Run the ghost on phase-destroyed AND sign-flipped surrogates of the real bars. Expect meanR ~ 0, p>0.01. Record the apparatus noise floor (~+/-0.03R at n~3800) per instrument. If the ghost profits from noise, HALT — every downstream number is void.

== DISCOVERY SWEEP (find gaps not yet named) ==
Do not assume the six are all of them. Run the full 8-class discrepancy register across EVERY subsystem and report any NEW intent-vs-reality gap found: declared-but-vestigial logic, comments that describe behaviour the code doesn't implement, a phase whose output no live path consumes, any orphaned data path, any two copies of the same decision that could diverge (parity-class), any absolute constant not yet in a legal form. A gap found and reported is worth more than a fix rushed.

== VERIFICATION BAR (per gap) ==
Each gap's warrant states: the intent (quote the design), the measured reality (the number proving the gap), the bridge, the numeric prediction, and the orthogonal-metric before/after that will confirm closure. A gap is CLOSED only when its orthogonal metric improved AND parity/null-ghost still pass. Report the competence vector and prediction-MAE trend — state plainly, per gap, CLOSED / HELD / FAILED.

== SEQUENCE & RULES ==
11-stage sequence. Stage -1 read ledger; Stage 0 re-profile instrument; interleave Warrant->Reinforce->Harden->Validate->Compile per subsystem, never batched. Relay checkpoints after Layer 1, Layer 2, and Layer 3. Consolidated report at Stage 8: a gap-by-gap CLOSED/HELD/FAILED table, plus any newly-discovered gaps.

HARD RULES: no forcing a passing calibration from data that refuses (a STAND DOWN is correct — report it). Ship refutations. No absolute magic numbers. Never validate a rule against a label from its own inputs. Live attach requires Manuel's explicit go-ahead after he reads real numbers. If parity or null-ghost fails, HALT.

The goal is not another increment. It is the build where intent and reality are the same program — every declared capability real, every learned number powered and replicated, every gate audited. Perfected means: nothing the design promises is missing, and nothing the code does is unproven.
